message:
test: expand roundtrip coverage with 11 Codex→provider tests, add 5 new providers and large-session stress tests

- Extend roundtrip_test.rs with 11 Codex-to-provider roundtrip scenarios
- Add 5 new provider variants to atomic_write_test.rs
- Expand error_paths_test.rs with additional failure mode coverage
- Add large-session stress tests to pipeline_test.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
